prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: car personality character portrait for a result page
Primary request: create a full-body single-character illustration for the car personality PSCV 务实省心型, inspired by mainstream MBTI-style character art, but original and not copying any existing branded character. The character should feel practical, reliable, calm, grounded, and family-oriented.
Scene/background: clean light beige studio background with no scenery
Subject: an approachable adult character, neutral pose, tidy practical outfit with subtle automotive cues, clipboard or maintenance checklist in hand
Style/medium: polished flat cartoon illustration, soft vector-like shading, rounded shapes, expressive face, premium app-friendly MBTI-like character aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered full body, strong silhouette, mobile-friendly poster composition
Lighting/mood: soft warm daylight, calm and reassuring
Color palette: warm orange, beige, muted brown, soft gray accents
Constraints: one character only, no text, no watermark, no logos, no car in background, transparent storytelling through pose and props only
Avoid: photorealism, 3D render, cluttered background, multiple characters, extreme exaggeration
style: polished flat cartoon illustration, mainstream MBTI-style personality character aesthetic
composition: centered full body character, clean result-card composition
lighting: soft warm daylight, calm and reassuring
constraints: one character only, no text, no watermark, no logos, clean light beige background
negative: photorealism, cluttered background, multiple characters, 3D render
